definitions.text: A colour like that of chocolate or coffee.
examples: The browns and greens in this painting give it a nice woodsy feel.
He wore brown jeans for his birthday.

definitions.text: One of the colour balls used in snooker, with a value of 4 points.

Of or relating to any of various ethnic groups having dark pigmentation of the skin. Latino/Latin American of color. South Asian or sometimes Middle Eastern or North African Southeast Asian, Pacific Islander, or sometimes Native American

examples: Fry the onions until they brown.

definitions.text: To cook something until it becomes brown.
